title: Acinopetala chontalensis
taxonomy: Acinopetala chontalensis is classified as a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. It belongs to the genus Acinopetala, which is a group of flowering plants. The plant is native to Central America and is part of the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The classification of Acinopetala chontalensis is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. This classification helps to understand the plant's relationships with other organisms and its place in the botanical hierarchy.
